mapper.select:
select a.*, b.employee_name from hrm_additional as a left join hrm_employee as b on a.employee_id = b.employee_id WHERE 1=1
AND a.employee_id in (select employee_id from hrm_employee where employee_Name like concat('%',#{data.employeeName},'%'))
select * from hrm_additional where employee_id=#{employeeId} and `year`=#{year} and `month`=#{month}
